# Atlas — AI Workplace Productivity Assistant

> Atlas helps professionals draft emails, summarize meetings, plan their week, and research topics with AI.

## Pages
- [Dashboard](/): Productivity metrics and quick access to all AI tools.
- [Smart Email Generator](/email): Draft professional emails in 4 tones.
- [Meeting Summarizer](/summarize): Extract key points, decisions, action items, and deadlines.
- [Task Planner](/planner): Build prioritized daily and weekly schedules.
- [Research Assistant](/research): Summaries, trends, insights, and recommendations.
- [AI Chatbot](/chat): Interactive workplace assistant.
